title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
ARCHITECTURE.md has been significantly updated (102 lines changed) with mermaid diagram, engine layer docs, adapter docs, and module sections. ONE remaining stale item:

1. Known limitation #5 (line 627) says "runtime/memory.js 待实现" but memory.js IS implemented with 26 passing tests and full add/search/remove/clear API. Remove this limitation.

2. Review architecture gaps: store/index.js formal section may need brief addition (currently only in mermaid + directory tree). embed.js adapters and sense.js full API could use brief formal sections.

The 85% → 90% gap should close once limitation #5 is removed and remaining gaps are addressed.
